title: Food Day in Canada Act
description: Food Day in Canada Act (Food Day in Canada Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Food Day in Canada Act .

provisions.title: Food Day in Canada
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the Saturday before the first Monday in August is to be known as “Food Day in Canada”.
